prompt: A clean retro-futurist presentation board on a muted periwinkle-blue background with a minimalist editorial layout, showing 4 analog-inspired audio product concept visuals arranged horizontally. On the far left, a partially cropped reference image of a vintage reel-to-reel tape deck and silver stereo receiver on a wooden shelf against a warm off-white wall; two large white reels with dark green centers, brushed metal knobs, a blue-lit display, and pale mint and silver hardware. To the right, 3 tall rounded-corner poster cards evenly spaced, all using the same cream paper tone, dark forest-green typography, mint-green product styling, and soft studio shadows. First poster: a spherical retro speaker/radio on a pedestal base, pale mint body with a circular front face, small display, and two side knobs, centered under a large bold uppercase headline reading SOUND, REIMAGINED.. Second poster: a mint-green vintage oscilloscope-like device with a CRT screen displaying a waveform, silver knobs and switches, and a metal tilt stand, centered under a bold uppercase headline reading WAVEFORM. Third poster: a compact mint-green portable cassette recorder/boombox with handle, front cassette window, buttons, speaker grille, and silver knobs, centered under a bold uppercase headline reading ANALOG STILL HITS.. Each poster includes tiny microtype, fake brand marks, and footer icons in a refined Swiss-modern advertising style. Use a restrained palette of dusty blue, cream, sage mint, forest green, silver, black, and warm wood. Add thin horizontal guide lines across the background and small footer text at the bottom reading MJ REFERENCE on the left and KREA  //  GPT 2 on the right. Overall look: premium concept design board, consistent aesthetic translation from analog hi-fi inspiration into three polished product posters, soft lighting, high-end graphic design, minimal clutter, crisp typography, and subtle nostalgic realism.
